title: webhook — bootstrap event catalog seed
description: Bootstrap events registered with the WebhookRegistry at deploy time. Only meta events — webhook.test (synthetic test event) + webhook.probe (health probe). Real business events (invitation.sent, notification.delivered, subscription.created, etc.) register at boot via #[AsWebhookEvent] discovery.

events.name: webhook.test
events.description: Synthetic test event dispatched by /subscriptions/{id}/test endpoint. Receivers should acknowledge with 200 OK and ignore.

payload_shape.note: This is a synthetic test event. Safe to ignore or acknowledge.

events.name: webhook.probe
events.description: Health probe event (only referenced by WebhookProbeJob for the probe HEAD; NOT dispatched as a real payload). Kept in catalog for documentation.
